name: Thai Spicy Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken, cut into small pieces
8 large Tiger shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the soaked rice noodles or stir-fry partially cooked thin noodles.
2. Mix together fish sauce, lime juice, tomato puree, sugar, and red pepper flakes in a bowl.
3. Process peanuts for at least half a cup; set aside some extra for garnish.
4. In a large wok over high heat, brown the garlic in oil until fragrant.
5. Add chicken, tofu, and shrimp to the wok; stir-fry until lightly browned.
6. Add eggs and continue to stir-fry until just cooked through.
7. Incorporate the drained rice noodles and sauce mixture into the wok; stir-fry for about 3 minutes.
8. Add peanuts, bean sprouts, and scallions; stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
9. Garnish with additional ground peanuts.
10. Serve immediately with lemon wedges, cucumber slices, and chopped coriander.
